specific_question: How many of the top 10 seasonal SKUs underperformed from June to August 2025 compared to the same period in 2024?
answer: Eight of the top 10 seasonal SKUs underperformed from June to August 2025 compared to the same period in 2024.
justification: This highlights the product categories most affected by reduced engagement and guides sales associates on which SKUs require greater personalized recommendation focus and on-floor visibility to improve sales.
dr_question: What are some ways for Lee's Market to enhance on-floor customer engagement to offset the impact of Canada’s July 2025 retail sales decline of 0.8% and drive a measurable rebound in the remaining months of 2025?
